# Assure Fintech

> India's financial truth platform. We show you the honest number on every financial product — credit cards, loans, insurance, savings, tax, and mutual funds. Free, no sign-up, zero tracking.

Assure Fintech calculates the gap between what banks advertise and what you actually get. Credit card "5% cashback" is really 2.8% after caps. Your "8.5% home loan" costs 9.35% after fees. Your "₹10L health insurance" pays out ₹4.2L after fine print. We do the math banks won't.

## Credit Card Tools

- [Smart Swipe Guide](/smart-swipe): Select your cards, enter spending, see the best card for every category with cap-adjusted math.
- [Card Gap Finder](/gap-finder): Find categories where better cards exist. See exact ₹ you're leaving on the table.
- [Swipe Check](/swipe-check): Merchant-level recommendations — pick Swiggy, Amazon, etc. and get top 3 cards with pro tips.
- [Compare](/compare): Head-to-head card comparison across 8 spending categories with auto-verdict.
- [Stack Builder](/stack-builder): Find the optimal 2-3 card combo from 75 cards for maximum savings.

## Card Reviews (75 cards, 25 verified)

Every card has a detailed review with editorial verdict, cap math in plain English, "best used for" and "don't use this for" sections, recommended pairings, and FAQ.

- [HDFC Millennia](/cards/hdfc-millennia), [HDFC Regalia](/cards/hdfc-regalia), [HDFC Infinia](/cards/hdfc-infinia), [HDFC Diners Black](/cards/hdfc-diners-black), [HDFC Swiggy](/cards/hdfc-swiggy)
- [Axis ACE](/cards/axis-ace), [Axis Flipkart](/cards/axis-flipkart), [Axis Atlas](/cards/axis-atlas)
- [Amazon Pay ICICI](/cards/amazon-icici), [ICICI Coral](/cards/icici-coral), [ICICI Sapphiro](/cards/icici-sapphiro), [ICICI Emeralde](/cards/icici-emeralde)
- [SBI Cashback](/cards/sbi-cashback), [SBI SimplyCLICK](/cards/sbi-simplyclick), [SBI ELITE](/cards/sbi-elite)
- [AU LIT](/cards/au-lit), [AU Zenith+](/cards/au-zenith), [IDFC FIRST WOW](/cards/idfc-wow), [IDFC FIRST Select](/cards/idfc-select)
- [OneCard](/cards/onecard), [BOB Eterna](/cards/bob-eterna), [Kotak 811 Dream](/cards/kotak-811)
- [IndusInd Legend](/cards/indusind-legend), [YES Private Ace](/cards/yes-ace), [RBL ShopRite](/cards/rbl-shoprite)
- Plus 50 additional cards tracked (marked unverified)

## Loan Guides (6 articles)

The honest number on loans — what banks don't advertise about the true cost of borrowing.

- [Home Loan True Cost](/learn/loans/home-loan-true-cost): Your 8.5% loan actually costs 9.35% after processing fees, insurance, and lock-in.
- [Personal Loan Actual APR](/learn/loans/personal-loan-actual-apr): Advertised 10.5%, actual 13.1% after origination fees and foreclosure penalty.
- [Fixed vs Floating Rate](/learn/loans/fixed-vs-floating-rate): 10-year comparison shows floating saves ₹4.4L — but with volatility.
- [SBI vs HDFC vs ICICI Home Loan](/learn/loans/sbi-vs-hdfc-vs-icici-home-loan): Honest comparison including fees, insurance, and effective APR.
- [Prepayment Penalty Trap](/learn/loans/prepayment-penalty-trap): "No lock-in" doesn't mean free — NBFCs charge 2-4% foreclosure penalty.
- [Education Loan Real Cost](/learn/loans/education-loan-real-cost): Moratorium interest adds 15-25% to total repayment.

## Insurance Guides (6 articles)

The honest number on insurance — what your policy actually pays when you need it.

- [Health Insurance Effective Coverage](/learn/insurance/health-insurance-effective-coverage): Your ₹10L policy pays out ₹4.2L after co-pay, room rent, sub-limits.
- [Claim Settlement Ratios 2026](/learn/insurance/claim-settlement-ratios-2026): Every major insurer ranked by claims approved.
- [Term Insurance Real Value](/learn/insurance/term-insurance-real-value): ₹1Cr cover is worth ₹92L after claim settlement ratio.
- [Room Rent Trap](/learn/insurance/room-rent-trap): ₹8K sub-limit turns ₹5L surgery into ₹3L payout via proportional reduction.
- [Health Insurance for Parents](/learn/insurance/health-insurance-for-parents): Pre-existing waiting, co-pay, and network hospitals for 55+ age group.
- [Co-pay vs No Co-pay](/learn/insurance/copay-vs-no-copay): 20% co-pay saves ₹3K/year but costs ₹1.6L in one hospitalization.

## Savings & FD Guides (5 articles)

The honest number on savings — what your money actually earns after tax and inflation.

- [FD Real Return](/learn/savings/fd-real-return): 7.5% FD returns 0.15% after TDS and inflation in the 30% bracket.
- [PPF vs FD vs Debt Fund](/learn/savings/ppf-vs-fd-vs-debt-fund): Post-tax, post-inflation returns compared across all three.
- [Best FD Rates 2026](/learn/savings/best-fd-rates-2026): Bank-wise FD rates with honest returns — big banks have negative real returns.
- [Senior Citizen FD](/learn/savings/senior-citizen-fd): Extra 0.5% yields ₹4,750/year on ₹10L — plus 80TTB benefit.
- [Tax-saving FD vs ELSS vs PPF](/learn/savings/tax-saving-fd-vs-elss-vs-ppf): All three get 80C. Returns after lock-in, tax, and inflation vary wildly.

## Tax Planning Guides (4 articles)

The honest number on taxes — which regime, deductions, and strategies actually save you money.

- [Old vs New Tax Regime](/learn/tax/old-vs-new-regime): Breakeven at ~₹3.75L deductions. Below that, new regime wins.
- [80C Beyond the Obvious](/learn/tax/80c-beyond-the-obvious): NPS gives extra ₹50K deduction. ELSS beats FD. Life insurance is worst option.
- [HRA Calculation](/learn/tax/hra-calculation): Exemption is minimum of three formulas — most people only check one.
- [Tax on Credit Card Rewards](/learn/tax/tax-on-credit-card-rewards): Cashback on purchases is not taxable. Welcome bonuses technically are above ₹50K.

## Mutual Fund Guides (3 articles)

The honest number on mutual funds — what you actually earn after expenses and tax.

- [CAGR vs Actual Return](/learn/mutual-funds/cagr-vs-actual-return): 15% CAGR becomes 11.8% after expense ratio + LTCG tax.
- [Direct vs Regular Plans](/learn/mutual-funds/direct-vs-regular): 1% expense difference costs ₹12L over 20 years on ₹10K/month SIP.
- [SIP Advertised vs Actual](/learn/mutual-funds/sip-advertised-vs-actual): Use XIRR not CAGR for SIP returns — actual is 2-3% lower than advertised.

## API

Free, public API for Indian credit card reward data.

- [All Cards](/api/cards): Returns all 75 cards with reward rates, fees, pros, cons, lounge access
- [Single Card](/api/cards/hdfc-regalia): Full details for a specific card
- [Recommendations](/api/recommend): Best card for a category, best free cards, stack optimization

API is open, requires no authentication, returns JSON with CORS enabled.

## Key Facts

- 75 credit cards tracked, 25 verified from bank documents
- 5 live credit card tools, all free
- 24 financial guides across loans, insurance, savings, tax, and mutual funds
- Zero user data collected, no tracking, no cookies
- Data updated monthly; banks change terms without notice and we catch it
- We may earn affiliate commissions — clearly labeled
- We are a tool, not financial advice
- Based in India, built for Indian consumers

## Contact

Website: https://assurefintech.com
API: https://assurefintech.com/api/recommend
